title: Fix scope-override parser Reason/Paths order + findOwnManifest trap

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Latest branch commit before merge; updated again at merge close via ops:proof-generate --merge-sha

new_tests: scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: parses a well-formed override with Reason before Paths
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: parses a well-formed override with Reason after Paths (schema doc documented order)
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: rejects a comment missing the two-line header
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: rejects a comment with no Paths
scope-override-comment-parser.test.ts: rejects a comment with a malformed Issue field
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 regression): a continuation PR from a renamed branch still finds its own lane by issue ID
file-scope-guard.test.ts: own manifest resolution (UTV2-1524 regression): a valid scope-override still applies through the issue-ID fallback

receipts.note: CI-tooling-only change (comment parser + manifest-resolution logic); test:db run as the standard T1 runtime-proof gate, not because this fix performs any DB write itself.
